samples.source_text: Are you taking any blood pressure medicine?
samples.translation_text: 您有在服用降血压药吗？

samples.source_text: You can try ibuprofen for the pain.
samples.translation_text: 您可以试试布洛芬来缓解疼痛。

samples.source_text: Please confirm your date of birth.
This medicine may make you sleepy.
samples.translation_text: 这个药可能会让您犯困。

samples.source_text: Can I have your Medicare number?
samples.translation_text: 可以告诉我您的 Medicare 号码吗？

samples.source_text: I will write down the medicine name.
Please ask your doctor if you are unsure.
samples.translation_text: 如果不确定，请咨询您的医生。

samples.source_text: Come back if the rash gets worse.
samples.translation_text: 如果皮疹加重，请再回来。
